name: p359a
drl:
rule "R0"
salience -10
when
    T1($a0 : f0)
    T1(!(f0 <= -1000000007), $b0 : f0)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1 : T0($b1 : f1)
then
    insert(new T1($p1.getF1(), "beta"));
    insert(new T1($b1, "a"));

rule "R5"
